hooks.command: LOG=/tmp/karma-hooks.log; SESSION_ID=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); TOOL=$(jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"'); echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] PreToolUse: session=$SESSION_ID tool=$TOOL" >> $LOG; export KARMA_SESSION_ID=$SESSION_ID KARMA_AGENT_ID=$SESSION_ID; [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ] && karma radio set-status active --message "Using $TOOL" >> $LOG 2>&1 || true

LOG=/tmp/karma-hooks.log; SESSION_ID=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); TOOL=$(jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"'); echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] PostToolUse: session=$SESSION_ID tool=$TOOL" >> $LOG; export KARMA_SESSION_ID=$SESSION_ID KARMA_AGENT_ID=$SESSION_ID; [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ] && karma radio report-progress --percent 0 --message "Completed $TOOL" >> $LOG 2>&1 || true

LOG=/tmp/karma-hooks.log; SESSION_ID=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Stop: session=$SESSION_ID" >> $LOG; export KARMA_SESSION_ID=$SESSION_ID KARMA_AGENT_ID=$SESSION_ID; [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ] && karma radio set-status completed --message "Session completed" >> $LOG 2>&1 || true

LOG=/tmp/karma-hooks.log; AGENT_ID=$(jq -r '.agent_id // empty'); SESSION_ID=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] SubagentStop: agent=$AGENT_ID session=$SESSION_ID" >> $LOG; export KARMA_SESSION_ID=$SESSION_ID KARMA_AGENT_ID=$AGENT_ID; [ -n "$AGENT_ID" ] && karma radio set-status completed --message "Subagent completed" >> $LOG 2>&1 || true
